''''Geneering Products''' was a company that manufactured [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic]] enhancements<ref name="FOP" /> and pharmaceuticals.<ref name="CRFG" /> Along with [[Response iMprOVEMENT Package]]s for [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborgs]],<ref name="FOP" /> they also developed the truth serum [[OV600]].<ref name="CRFG" />

{{Company-stub}}
